preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)
notes: v1.0.4: Production-grade batching across every ad platform — every API call now batched or parallelised.
whatsNew: Native Meta batch API: 5 hot paths refactored — lockdown is 10× faster, setup + discover + insights all use batched reads
All 9 ad platforms now batch-execute via a shared core: Meta native, everyone else via bounded parallel fetch
34 new unit tests covering ChunkRequests, ParallelFetch, BatchSuccess/Failures, and Meta native batch with mock HTTP server
